task_title: Provision Dev Infrastructure for Sigma-1 E2E Pipeline (Bolt - Kubernetes/Helm)
expansion_prompt: Break this task into subtasks covering: (1) Namespace creation with resource quotas and limit ranges, (2) CloudNative-PG Postgres cluster deployment and readiness validation, (3) Redis deployment, (4) ExternalSecret CRDs creation and sync verification for all 5 secrets, (5) ConfigMap creation aggregating all connection strings plus ServiceAccount/RBAC setup, (6) Cilium NetworkPolicy application and smoke Pod validation. Each subtask should be independently verifiable. The smoke pod validation subtask depends on all others completing first.
reasoning: This task involves provisioning an entire dev namespace with multiple infrastructure components (CNPG Postgres, Redis, ExternalSecrets, ConfigMap, Cilium NetworkPolicies, RBAC ServiceAccount) and a smoke test. Each component is a distinct piece of infrastructure with its own CRDs, configuration, and validation criteria. Multiple technologies involved (CNPG operator, external-secrets operator, Cilium, K8s RBAC) plus inter-component wiring.

task_title: Implement Agent Delegate Resolution in PM Server (Nova - Bun/Elysia)
expansion_prompt: Break down into: (1) ConfigMap/secret mounting configuration in the PM server deployment, (2) resolve_agent_delegates() function implementation with agent-to-Linear-user-ID mapping, (3) Idempotent issue creation logic with duplicate detection via deterministic identifiers, (4) Linear API retry logic with exponential backoff and structured logging, (5) POST /api/pipeline/delegate-status endpoint and integration of delegate resolution into the issue creation flow. Consider that idempotency and delegate resolution are the two most complex pieces requiring careful design.
reasoning: Multiple interacting concerns: delegate resolution mapping, Linear API integration with assignee setting, idempotency logic requiring duplicate detection queries, retry with backoff, a new observability endpoint, and structured logging across all stages. The idempotency mechanism in particular requires careful design around deterministic identifiers and querying existing issues.

task_title: Integrate Hermes Research in Deliberation Path (Nova - Bun/Elysia)
expansion_prompt: Break down into: (1) Hermes API client module with NOUS_API_KEY authentication, (2) Circuit breaker implementation using opossum or equivalent with configurable timeout/threshold/reset, (3) Integration into the deliberation pipeline stage with research query derivation and artifact persistence, (4) Fallback behavior and availability gating (no API key, circuit open, timeout scenarios), (5) Health check integration reporting circuit breaker state. The circuit breaker is the most architecturally significant piece and should be implemented as a reusable component.
reasoning: Involves external API client implementation, circuit breaker pattern with specific configuration (timeout, failure threshold, reset), integration into an existing pipeline stage, multiple fallback paths (no key, timeout, circuit open), persistence of results for downstream validation, and health check reporting. The circuit breaker pattern alone adds significant complexity with its state machine.

task_title: Implement Design Snapshot PR Surfacing Dashboard Component (Blaze - React/Next.js)
expansion_prompt: Break down into: (1) Route/navigation setup and DesignSnapshotPRList component with data fetching and loading/empty/error states, (2) DesignSnapshotPRDetail component with scaffold file listing and PR metadata display, (3) Accessibility compliance (semantic HTML, ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, axe-core validation), (4) Pipeline scoping via pipelineRunId prop/URL param integration. Ensure adherence to existing design system without new dependencies.
reasoning: New dashboard section with two components, multiple states (loading, empty, error, populated), data fetching from an API, accessibility requirements, navigation integration, pipeline scoping, and adherence to an existing design system. Moderate-to-high complexity as a feature but well-scoped to the frontend domain.

task_title: Implement Discord and Linear Bridge Notifications (Nova - Bun/Elysia)
expansion_prompt: Break down into: (1) Notification dispatcher module with uniform interface and dependency-injectable HTTP client, (2) Discord bridge notification implementation with auth and payload formatting, (3) Linear bridge notification implementation with auth and payload formatting, (4) Retry policy with exponential backoff, graceful degradation (try/catch wrapping), structured logging, and pipeline orchestrator hook integration. Discord and Linear implementations can be parallelized.
reasoning: Creates a notification system with a uniform interface dispatching to two different bridge services. Includes retry logic, graceful degradation (must not block pipeline), auth header management, structured logging, and pipeline lifecycle hooks. The two bridge integrations are similar but distinct, and the graceful degradation pattern needs careful implementation.

task_title: Validate End-to-End Pipeline Completion (Tess - Test frameworks)
expansion_prompt: Break down into: (1) Test infrastructure setup including framework configuration, environment variable documentation, and test timeout configuration, (2) Core pipeline execution test (POST PRD, assert completion, timing SLA), (3) Task generation and agent assignment validation tests (task count, field presence, 80% delegate coverage), (4) Linear session, PR creation, and no-fatal-errors validation tests. Tests should be ordered to fail fast on pipeline execution before checking downstream artifacts.
reasoning: Seven distinct test cases covering the full pipeline from trigger through completion. Requires interaction with the live deployed environment, multiple API endpoints, log inspection, timing assertions, and regex pattern matching. The integration nature means tests have complex prerequisites and environment dependencies. Test timeout management (360s) and environment configuration add operational complexity.

task_title: Verify Linear Issues Have Delegate Assignments (Tess - Test frameworks)
expansion_prompt: Break down into: (1) Test setup: retrieve pipeline run results and issue IDs, establish reference delegate mapping from delegate-status endpoint, (2) Assignee presence and correct mapping tests querying Linear GraphQL API directly, (3) Edge case tests: unassigned handling verification with log correlation, no agent:pending labels, and issue metadata validation. Key dependency: must query Linear API independently, not through PM server.
reasoning: Focused validation task but requires direct Linear GraphQL API queries, cross-referencing delegate mappings, handling edge cases (unassigned issues), log correlation, and multiple assertion types. The need to query Linear independently and cross-reference with the delegate mapping adds moderate complexity.

task_title: Validate Hermes Research Memo Content (Tess - Test frameworks)
expansion_prompt: Break down into: (1) Primary path validation: Hermes content presence, quality (length > 100), and circuit breaker status when NOUS_API_KEY is set, (2) Fallback path validation: fallback memo structure and skip logging when NOUS_API_KEY is not set, (3) Environment-aware test orchestration: detection logic for API key availability, conditional test execution, and ensuring at least one path is validated. Tests must be environment-aware and both code paths need coverage.
reasoning: Environment-conditional testing requiring two distinct validation paths. Tests need to detect runtime configuration, adapt assertions accordingly, query deliberation artifacts and circuit breaker status, validate content quality, and check structured logs. The dual-path nature and environment awareness add moderate complexity beyond simple assertion tests.

task_title: Validate Design Snapshot PR Surfacing in Frontend (Tess - Test frameworks)
expansion_prompt: Break down into: (1) Navigation and section visibility tests with Playwright or existing E2E framework, (2) PR data display, GitHub link, and task scaffold list validation tests, (3) Empty state, accessibility (axe-core scan), and pipeline scoping tests. Consider that this requires a browser-based test runner and may need mock data setup for empty state testing.
reasoning: Browser-based E2E testing with Playwright requiring navigation, DOM assertions, link validation, accessibility scanning, empty state mocking, and pipeline scoping verification. Seven test cases spanning different aspects of the frontend component. The accessibility and empty state testing require specific setup.

task_title: Production Hardening: HA, Ingress, Security, and RBAC (Bolt - Kubernetes/Helm)
expansion_prompt: Break down into: (1) CloudNative-PG HA scaling to 3 replicas with failover testing, (2) Redis HA/Sentinel configuration with connection string updates, (3) Ingress with TLS termination via cert-manager including rate limiting and request size annotations, (4) Cilium NetworkPolicy hardening with deny-all default and exact port allowlisting, (5) RBAC audit and tightening for all service accounts with dedicated Roles/ClusterRoles, (6) Secret rotation via external-secrets refreshInterval and rolling restart triggers, (7) Audit logging setup and production-hardening.md documentation. These subtasks can be largely parallelized except the documentation which should come last.
reasoning: Extremely broad scope touching nearly every infrastructure concern: HA for two stateful services (Postgres with failover, Redis with Sentinel), TLS ingress with cert-manager, network policy hardening with deny-all default, comprehensive RBAC audit and tightening, secret rotation mechanisms, audit logging, and documentation. Each area is independently complex (e.g., CNPG failover testing, Sentinel configuration, Cilium policy authoring) and spans multiple Kubernetes resource types and operators.
